---
title: "test"
format: html
---

# Abc

text goes here....

## Exercise 1
### a
### b
### c

## Exercise 2

## Exercise 3

### a
![Caption](elephant.png)

accepts html code

$$
x=f(N,K)
$$

in this case the shourt run prouction
function is $x=f(N)$


| Right | Left | Default | Center |
|------:|:-----|---------|:------:|
|   12  |  12  |    12   |    12  |
|  123  |  123 |   123   |   123  |
|    1  |    1 |     1   |     1  |
